home.title: Julia's Magical World
home.tagline: Every child is the hero of their own story

create.childNameLabel: Grown-up corner: add your child's name (optional)
create.childTraitsLabel: ✨ Premium: tell us about your child (optional)
create.childTraitsPlaceholder: e.g. curly red hair, loves dinosaurs, brave and kind

generating.title: Your story is coming to life...
generating.hint: The magic wand is drawing your pictures

story.celebrationText: Your masterpiece is saved in your library.

library.title: My stories
library.empty: No stories here yet. Let's make your first one!

parent.intro: Create a free account to keep your child's stories safe in the cloud and open them on any device.
parent.checkEmail: Almost there! Open your email and tap the confirmation link.
parent.synced: {count, plural, =1 {1 story is} other {# stories are}} safe in the cloud
parent.syncInfo: Your library syncs automatically while you are signed in.
parent.notConfigured: Cloud accounts are not set up in this build. Everything is saved on this device.

beach.title: {name}'s Splashy Beach Day
beach.page1: {intro} went to the beach on a big sunny day. The waves said hello: splash, splash!
beach.page2: {name} built a giant sandcastle with tall towers and a little door.
beach.page3: A friendly crab waved its claw. “Come and play with me, {name}!”
beach.page4: {name} watched the golden sunset from a little boat. What a splashy, happy day!
beach.page1Child: {child} went to the beach with {friend} on a big sunny day. The waves said hello: splash, splash!
beach.page2Child: {child} built a giant sandcastle, and {friend} helped dig the moat.
beach.page3Child: A friendly crab waved its claw. “Come and play with me, {child}!”
beach.page4Child: {child} and {friend} watched the golden sunset from a little boat. What a splashy, happy day!

forest.title: {name}'s Forest Adventure
forest.page1: {intro} skipped into the green, green forest. The trees waved their leafy arms.
forest.page2: {name} found a mushroom house with a tiny red door. Who could live there?
forest.page3: A beautiful butterfly landed right on {name}. It tickled!
forest.page4: {name} danced with the forest friends until the stars came out. Good night, forest!
forest.page1Child: {child} skipped into the green, green forest with {friend}. The trees waved their leafy arms.
forest.page2Child: {child} found a mushroom house with a tiny red door. Who could live there?
forest.page3Child: A beautiful butterfly landed right on {child}. It tickled!
forest.page4Child: {child} and {friend} danced with the forest friends until the stars came out. Good night, forest!

castle.title: {name} and the Big Castle
castle.page1: {intro} saw a big castle on top of a hill. Its flags danced in the wind.
castle.page2: {name} climbed the castle steps — one, two, three — all the way to the big door.
castle.page3: Inside there was a party with balloons! Everyone cheered for {name}.
castle.page4: The king said: “{name}, you are the bravest friend in all the kingdom!”
castle.page1Child: {child} and {friend} saw a big castle on top of a hill. Its flags danced in the wind.
castle.page2Child: {child} climbed the castle steps — one, two, three — all the way to the big door.
castle.page3Child: Inside there was a party with balloons! Everyone cheered for {child}.
castle.page4Child: The king said: “{child}, you are the bravest friend in all the kingdom!”

space.title: {name} Blasts Off to Space
space.page1: {intro} climbed into a shiny rocket. Three, two, one... blast off!
space.page2: {name} bounced on the moon. Boing, boing, boing! The Earth looked tiny far away.
space.page3: A little star wanted a hug. {name} gave it the biggest hug in the galaxy.
space.page4: {name} flew home past the ringed planet, waving good night to every star.
space.page1Child: {child} climbed into a shiny rocket with {friend}. Three, two, one... blast off!
space.page2Child: {child} bounced on the moon. Boing, boing, boing! The Earth looked tiny far away.
space.page3Child: A little star wanted a hug. {child} gave it the biggest hug in the galaxy.
space.page4Child: {child} and {friend} flew home past the ringed planet, waving good night to every star.

farm.title: {name}'s Day at the Farm
farm.page1: {intro} visited a farm early in the morning. The big red barn said welcome!
farm.page2: {name} helped feed the fluffy chickens and the happy pink pig.
farm.page3: The tractor took {name} on a bumpy, bouncy ride around the field. Wheee!
farm.page4: The moon came up and all the animals yawned. Good night, farm. Good night, {name}.
farm.page1Child: {child} visited a farm with {friend} early in the morning. The big red barn said welcome!
farm.page2Child: {child} helped feed the fluffy chickens and the happy pink pig.
farm.page3Child: The tractor took {child} and {friend} on a bumpy, bouncy ride around the field. Wheee!
farm.page4Child: The moon came up and all the animals yawned. Good night, farm. Good night, {child}.
